actionUnits.condition: Manual invocation of parameterless public method on MonoBehaviour (GUID: b11066ff95bbf3344b868394742f7002, MonoBehaviour id: 1695945195). This exercises runtime reinitialization path after AutoInitialize() has configured audio at startup.
Manual invocation of parameterless public method on MonoBehaviour (GUID: b11066ff95bbf3344b868394742f7002, MonoBehaviour id: 1695945195). This exercises shutdown/cleanup path after reinitialization.

UNITY_EDITOR only. Editor MenuItem methods on SteamAudioManager (GUID: b11066ff95bbf3344b868394742f7002, MonoBehaviour id: 1695945195). These are compiled only in Editor and exercise export/settings code paths.
